name: Tavily
description: AI-native web search and content-extraction API designed for LLM agents. Returns ranked results with summaries; can fetch and clean full page content. Great for open-ended prospection ('find SaaS companies that mention switching from manual workflows').

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API key (starts with tvly-)
credential_fields.description: Tavily API key from app.tavily.com → API Keys

tools.name: search
tools.description: Run an AI-optimised web search. Returns ranked results with title, URL, content snippet, and an LLM-generated answer if requested. Use for ICP discovery, competitive scans, and intent research.

search_depth.description: 'advanced' costs more credits but does deeper crawling

days.description: For topic='news': only results from last N days

include_answer.description: Include an LLM-generated answer summarizing the results

include_raw_content.description: Include full cleaned text of each result page

include_domains.description: Only return results from these domains

country.description: ISO country code to bias localized results

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Fetch one or more URLs and return cleaned page content optimized for LLM consumption. Use after a search to pull deeper context from selected pages.

tools.name: crawl
tools.description: Crawl a website starting from a seed URL and return cleaned content for matching pages. Use for site-wide research ('what does this company say about AI').

instructions.description: Natural-language hints for what to keep/skip

tools.name: map
tools.description: Discover the URL graph of a site without fetching content. Returns the list of reachable URLs from a seed.
